component.name: Codex Desktop Linux
component.summary: Community-maintained Linux packaging for Codex Desktop

description.p: Codex Desktop Linux packages the upstream Codex Desktop application for Linux desktops using this repository's Linux compatibility patches, launcher, and rebuild pipeline.

This Flatpak build keeps the core desktop experience inside the sandbox by storing state under Flatpak-managed config and data directories, shipping a bundled managed Node runtime, bundling the Codex CLI plus runtime tools such as Git and ripgrep, and exposing the audio socket needed for in-app voice input and output.

Broad host filesystem grants, native package update flows, host browser and native-host integrations, and Linux Computer Use are outside the default Flatpak scope. User-selected files and directories can still be exposed through the document portal without opening general host access.

screenshot.caption: Start a new Codex task from the desktop app.
Review active projects, threads, and automation work in the sidebar.
Inspect task output and review pending changes before continuing locally.
